reason: Locked requirements + Q1-Q4 ADR-lite + four-phase implementation plan. The contract to implement against.
Hard rules quick-reference (AGPL SPDX / Pydantic _Strict / atomic writes / no-LangChain-outside-agents). Translation adapter rewrite must respect all of these.
Subprocess-isolation pattern (BabelDOC follows MineruConverter recipe) + lazy heavy-import pattern. Threaded loop inside the worker still must respect spawn-safe + lazy babeldoc import discipline.
Subprocess crash isolation + the recently added 'HTTP file-serving endpoint security' pattern. The warmup ErrorEvent path needs to follow the same boundary-error discipline.
Two-stream model — translation appends ONLY to conversation-log.jsonl (NOT wiki/log.md) per canonical spec. Adapter changes must not cross-write.
translations/ as 10th workspace dir + accessor discipline. New integration test must respect the same workspace-internal-only access rule.

Full BabelDOC 0.6.2 API surface: async_translate / do_translate_async_stream / TranslationConfig knobs, 13-stage pipeline names, ProcessPoolExecutor + spawn requirement, mono+dual config. Reference for both the streaming rewrite and the warmup wrapper.
